prompt: A full-body anime fantasy heroine in a grand stained-glass cathedral, viewed from a dramatic low angle. She is a beautiful young knight-princess with very long, flowing twin-tail hair in pastel pink, the hair streaming outward in luminous ribbons as if caught by magical wind. Her face is intentionally obscured by a simple rectangular blur block. She wears ornate white and deep royal blue ceremonial armor with lavish gold filigree, a fitted breastplate, layered shoulder armor, long armored sleeves, a short blue skirt with gold trim, white thigh-high stockings with lace tops, and intricate gold knee and shin guards. A large crimson cape with a pale inner lining billows around her. One hand rests near her chest while the other hangs gracefully at her side. At her hip is an elegant sword with a glowing blue blade and a highly decorated gold-and-jewel hilt. The setting is flooded with radiant sunlight pouring through towering multicolored stained-glass windows and gothic arches, filling the scene with sparkling highlights, prism-like reflections, floating glitter, and magical particles. Use an ultra-detailed, highly polished anime illustration style with rich gemlike colors, intense backlighting, glossy surfaces, shimmering metal, dynamic cloth motion, and a majestic holy-fantasy atmosphere. Emphasize cinematic composition, heroic presence, and breathtaking luminous detail.
